"use strict"; module.exports = function () { return ` ESLint couldn't find an eslint.config.(js|mjs|cjs) file. From ESLint v9.0.0, the default configuration file is now eslint.config.js. If you are using a .eslintrc.* file, please follow the migration guide to update your configuration file to the new format: https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/configure/migration-guide If you still have problems after following the migration guide, please stop by https://eslint.org/chat/help to chat with the team. `.trimStart(); };
